title: andropogon tener subvar. typicus
intro: Andropogon tener subvar. typicus, also known as False Bahia grass or Bahiagrass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon tener subvar. typicus include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
